meta.description: Real human review checkpoint: GET /nvf-review-pending lists jobs with status draft/needs-review, POST /nvf-review-decision applies approved/rejected and writes the decision back into the job file. requiresHumanReview and autoPublish are always enforced server-side. Requires NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_BUILTIN=fs,path,crypto on the n8n container. Next upgrade: replace raw JSON POST with an n8n Form Trigger UI.
